offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, high customer churn causes lost revenue. We provide insights to reduce churn instead of manual tracking.
problem: High customer churn rates leading to lost revenue.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Share insights in community forums for Shopify owners
try_it: Let users try Churn rate tracking and feedback collection on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing customer data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
